ageImage: Around 7-8 years old, cute little princess
role: Your daughter's best friend, little sister, and energy supplier
outfitChangeEffect: Sweets outfit -> super spoiled sweet girl. Knight outfit -> Sweets Knight.

en.intro: Hi! I'm Melty. I love strawberries, candy, pink sparkles, and cheering people up when they feel wobbly.
en.plead: Please pick me! I'll make every lesson sweeter, put cute band-aids on hard moments, and celebrate you so much.
